title: BEM-866 Claude report lines
objective:
Run script:
"""
report = Path('governance/reports/bem865_claude_write_selftest.md')
text = report.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if report.exists() else ''
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_claude_report_lines')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
for i, line in enumerate(text.splitlines()[:120], 1):
    if line.strip() or i <= 20:
        safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in line.strip())[:140] or 'blank'
        marker = outdir / (str(i).zfill(4) + '_' + safe + '.md')
        marker.write_text('# BEM-866 Claude report line\nLine: ' + str(i) + '\nText: ' + line + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(marker))
        count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CLAUDE_REPORT_LINES_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 Claude report lines\nReport exists: ' + str(report.exists()) + '\nLines marked: ' + str(count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('Claude report lines marked: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
